title: rosa × waitziana var. occulta
intro: Rosa × waitziana var. occulta, also known as the hidden wild rose, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rosa × waitziana hybrid. This plant is a type of flowering shrub with medicinal properties attributed to its flowers, leaves, and roots. The Rosa × waitziana var. occulta is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and promote wound healing. It is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits include supporting immune function, reducing fever, and providing relief from anxiety and stress.
